spatial_note: The spatial term is a Bayesian presence/background incident-density offset: incident locations (presences, y=1) versus sea-cell pseudo-absences sampled from the geo-grid (y=0). It is fit separately from the M3 attribute coefficients because the uneventful reports lack coordinates. The fitted offset f = sum_j w_j (B_j - col_means_j) is ADDED to the M3 base logit and is NOT orthogonalized against depth/distance.
